name: Turkey Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté onion and celery in margarine until tender.
2. Add flour, salt, pepper, and thyme. Stir to combine.
3. Gradually add broth, stirring constantly to avoid lumps.
4. Add potatoes and carrots. Bring mixture to a simmer, then cover and cook over low heat for 15 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
5. Stir in zucchini, apple juice, and cooked turkey. Continue cooking on low heat for an additional 10 minutes.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
